name: Margaret — 82, single, gets Attendance Allowance, lives alone
note: The severe-disability amount at work: AA is not counted as income, but getting it adds £86.05 to her guarantee — £147.60 a week she appears entitled to.
checked: Arithmetic hand-worked against SPC Regs 2002 reg 6(5)(a) (£86.05) and Sch 1 Pt I para 1 conditions, 2026-07-12. AA answers restate her existing award (day-time needs).

winter-fuel-payment.because: £300 for your household this winter (someone was born before 28 September 1946), paid automatically in November or December — no claim needed for most people, and nothing is recovered at your incomes.
